scope: quant-analyst (QA-101~109), platform-architect (PA-101~108), risk-execution-engineer (RE-101~104), data-engineer (DE-101~104), qa-tester (QT-101~107), devops-monitor (DM-101~110)
note: code-safety-reviewer.json absent from findings directory. CSR-101/CSR-102 analyzed via sandbox_builtins.py and syntax_checker.py direct code reading using AUDIT-2026-0525-001 context.

adjustments_detail: DM-105: medium->low (doc says 5+ restarts, code has MaxConsecutiveFailures=3; documentation typo only, no functional impact)
DM-107: medium->low (fx_trading_system_spec.md:1035 REJECT-only audit requirement; APPROVE logging not mandated by spec)
DM-110: low->info (positive confirmation: datetime.utcnow grep returns 0 matches in trading_platform/)

results.rationale: Confirmed. scripts/apply_gate_to_results.py:70-73: (pf is not None and pf >= PF_MIN). When gross_loss==0 profit_factor=None (event_simulator.py:1374-1381). Runner _t1_cond (runner.py:775-796) also returns passed=False for None. Gate outcome identical. Low severity appropriate.

Confirmed. event_simulator.py:1374-1381: profit_factor=None when gross_loss==0. runner.py:799 evaluates via _t1_cond (lines 775-796) returning passed=False. All-wins scenario causes incorrect Gate FAIL. Medium severity confirmed.

Confirmed Gate connection. config/defaults.py:302-303: WFA_OOS_MONTHS=6, WFA_STEP_MONTHS=1 -> 83% OOS overlap. event_simulator.py:1606-1607: np.mean(oos_pfs)=mean-of-ratios. result_parser.py:232-255: _compute_oos_is_ratio -> Tier2 OOS/IS PF Ratio weight=0.12. Combined WFA Tier2 weight=0.30. Medium severity confirmed.

Confirmed. event_simulator.py:1606-1607: np.mean(oos_pfs)=mean-of-ratios (MoR). Ratio-of-means statistically preferred when walk sample sizes differ. Magnitude small with typical 20-50 trades per walk. Low severity appropriate.

Confirmed. portfolio_analyzer.py:117-124: equity=np.cumprod(1.0+returns) compound basis for MaxDD. Line 279: pnl_series/ec0 additive basis. Basis mismatch is post-processing analytics only, not Gate-connected. Low severity appropriate.
Confirmed. WFA Efficiency denominator inconsistency plausible given step_months=1/oos_months=6 overlap from QA-103. Partially mitigated by weight redistribution when None. Low severity appropriate.

Confirmed. comparator.py:99-113: pct_change without METRICS_SCHEMA_VERSION check (currently 6.0.0). Field semantics may differ across versions. Comparator is analytics output, not Gate-connected. Low severity appropriate.
Confirmed. comparator.py:48: U+FFFD replacement characters in error message. Line 207: corrupted Japanese docstring. File saved with wrong encoding. Low severity - developer experience only.
Positive confirmation. scorer.py:50-54: _normalize_pf is None-safe. vectorbt_engine.py:953,981: both None-safe. No regression. Info level appropriate.

Confirmed. strategy_slot.py:1287: hasattr(self.strategy, _in_position) is dead code. Grep word-boundary returns 0 results across codebase. All 187 plain-search matches are _bars_in_position substrings. hasattr guard never fires; position management logic permanently bypassed. High severity confirmed.

Confirmed. runner.py:326: await _bus_ref.health_status(). memory_adapter.py:253: synchronous def. redis_adapter.py:384: also synchronous. await on sync dict raises TypeError. health_check.py:339: ok=False always. EventBus permanently UNHEALTHY. event_bus in CRITICAL_COMPONENTS. High severity confirmed.

Confirmed. main.py: no restore_positions calls. runner.py:385-391: restore_positions called for LIVE slots during UnifiedRunner startup. Dual-implementation anti-pattern: production path restores positions; dev/FastAPI path does not. Ghost positions risk after restart via dev path. High severity confirmed.

Confirmed. strategy_slot.py:999,1074: new uuid4() for LIVE/PAPER exit SignalEvent. strategy_slot.py:1041: correct exit_correlation_id for FillEvent. Correlation chain broken at exit. Low severity - observability only, not execution correctness.
Confirmed conditionally. redis_adapter.py:249-265: fallback to _dispatch_local skips dedup when Redis unavailable. Under normal Redis operation dedup works. Low severity - conditional path.

Confirmed. strategy_slot.py:558-577: explicit bind+unbind_contextvars in _handle_entry. Lines 847-860: context manager in _handle_exit. Asymmetry exists but both correctly scope context. Low severity - cosmetic inconsistency.

Confirmed. SHARED_CONTRACT.md:63 references tests/unit/test_strategy_loader_sandbox_builtins.py which does NOT exist. Documented enforcement mechanism test missing. sandbox_builtins.py has __import__ (required for from __future__ import annotations) but no dedicated test verifies safety. Low severity.

Confirmed. loader.py:675-692: inspect.getmembers returns alphabetically ordered classes. strategy_classes[0] selects first by alphabet. Helper class sorting before main strategy causes silent wrong class loading. Low severity - naming convention prevents this currently but fragile.

Confirmed. runner.py:291, main.py:81: PreTradeRiskControl() with no currency_converter. OandaCurrencyConverter: 0 instantiations in trading_platform/ production. ptrc.py:115-161: _unsafe_static_in_live=True. ptrc.py:218-254: fail-safe REJECT when quote_ccy != account_currency. EUR_USD: quote_ccy=USD != account_currency=JPY -> REJECT always. High severity confirmed.

Confirmed by design. risk_supervisor.py:623-629: daily_unrealized_pnl intentionally 0 (documented in code comment). Lines 407-433: can_open_position uses daily_realized_pnl_total only. Lines 858-947: unrealized blocking NOT performed. Known design tradeoff. Medium severity appropriate.

Confirmed conditionally. ptrc.py:88-92: create_task without task reference. audit_log.py:141: raise in except conflicts with fire-and-forget. Under RE-101 high-frequency REJECT scenario, task accumulation significant. should_consider given confirmed RE-101 scenario.

Confirmed conditionally. oanda_adapter/client.py:364-381: status!=201 as generic failure. Duplicate REJECT not specially handled. Conditionally reproducible when broker sends duplicate-REJECT response. Low severity appropriate.

Confirmed. bar_builder.py:239: None quality_engine skips all validation. main.py:318,334,459: BarBuilder/CandleFetcher/OANDAStreamReceiver all without quality_engine argument. DataQualityEngine: 0 instantiations in trading_platform/ production. All live data pipeline entry points bypass quality validation. High severity confirmed.

Confirmed as future risk. quality_engine.py:283: stateful self._last_bars[bar.instrument]. If shared across parallel strategies, race condition possible. Currently 0 instantiations (DE-101), risk dormant. Reproducible=False.
Positive confirmation. Data pipeline explicit gap detection logic confirmed. Info level appropriate.
Positive confirmation. Parquet compression and schema versioning confirmed present. Info level appropriate.

Confirmed. tests/fault/test_reconnect_cycle.py:50-64: _make_broker_trades() returns list[dict]. position_reconciler.py:155-158: bt.trade_id attribute access on dict -> AttributeError. Test masks production code defect path. High severity confirmed.

Confirmed. tests/parity/test_feature_store_parity.py:34-36: invalid OHLCV (high=close*(1+random), open_=np.roll(close,1)). 12 test files with similar fixtures, seed=123 producing ~37% invalid bars. Strategies validated against invalid data. Medium severity confirmed.

Confirmed. tests/integration/test_atlas_top3_strategies.py:368-377: warnings.warn only, no assert. Test passes with 0 signals. 5 strategy test files with false-green pattern. Integration tests pass regardless of signal generation. Medium severity confirmed.
Confirmed. Test coverage gaps for WFA edge cases. Low severity - coverage gap, not active defect.
Confirmed. Test isolation issues with shared state. Low severity appropriate.
Positive confirmation. Core backtest test coverage confirmed good. Info level appropriate.
Positive confirmation. Pytest configuration and fixtures well-structured. Info level appropriate.

Confirmed. dashboard/app.py:36: API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 hardcoded. logs/audit/round_1/fixes_applied.json confirms DM-004 NOT fixed. High severity - dashboard non-functional in any non-localhost deployment.

Confirmed. Same root cause as PA-102. runner.py:326: await sync method. memory_adapter.py:253, redis_adapter.py:384 both sync def. TypeError -> ok=False always -> EventBus permanently UNHEALTHY -> continuous false health alarms. High severity confirmed.
Confirmed conditionally. ptrc.py:88-92: fire-and-forget create_task. audit_log.py:141: raise in except. Under RE-101 high-frequency REJECT, task accumulation significant. Medium severity appropriate.
Confirmed. .env.example missing FTS_WATCHDOG_WEBHOOK_URL. runner_watchdog.ps1 references this for alerting. New deployments silently lose watchdog alerts. Medium severity appropriate.

Downgraded medium->low. runner_watchdog.ps1:24: $MaxConsecutiveFailures=3. restart_loop.md:44: 5 or more restarts. Documentation typo only - watchdog correctly triggers at 3. No functional impact. Low severity appropriate.
Confirmed. scripts/run_unified.py: no prometheus exposition endpoint. Monitoring stack expects metrics. Production metrics dark. Medium severity appropriate.

Downgraded medium->low. ptrc.py:293-299: APPROVE path no _fire_ptrc_audit. fx_trading_system_spec.md:1035: REJECT-only audit requirement. Normal APPROVE audit logging not mandated by spec. Finding premise overstated. Low severity appropriate.
Confirmed. Log rotation configuration gaps. Low severity appropriate.
Confirmed. Alerting threshold documentation inconsistencies beyond DM-105. Low severity appropriate.

Downgraded low->info. Positive confirmation. Grep datetime.utcnow in trading_platform/ returns 0 matches. datetime.UTC correctly adopted. No legacy calls found. Positive confirmation, not defect. Info level appropriate.
